What is the speed of light? ⚡

The speed of light in a vacuum is approximately 299,792,458 metres per second (roughly 300,000 km/s).

Key facts:

  • Denoted as c in physics
  • Exact by definition since 1983
  • Nothing with mass can reach or exceed it

Show me the formula for relativistic mass increase.

The relativistic mass formula is:

import math

def relativistic_mass(rest_mass, velocity):
    c = 299_792_458  # m/s
    gamma = 1 / math.sqrt(1 - (velocity / c) ** 2)
    return rest_mass * gamma
